6400. As used in this article, "legal document assistant" means any person who is not exempt pursuant to Section 6401 and who for compensation provides, or assists in providing, self-help services to a member of the public who is representing himself or herself in a legal matter involving any of the following:

(a) The preparation or completion of legal documents for filing in any California or federal court.

(b) Selecting, completing, or completing legal documents affecting the legal rights of the person.

(c) Understanding or using any legal document affecting the legal rights of the person.

(d) Understanding or using court procedures, rules, or policies.

6400.5. Every legal document assistant shall register with the county clerk in each county in which the legal document assistant has a principal place of business or in which the legal document assistant regularly performs services. A legal document assistant shall also be bonded in the amount of twenty-five thousand dollars ($25,000) issued by a surety insurer.

6401. This article does not apply to any of the following: (a) Any person licensed to practice law in California. (b) Any person employed by a California-licensed attorney. (c) Any nonprofit legal services organization.
